prerequisites.label: Kie.ai Account (app.kie.ai)
prerequisites.satisfy: Create a free account at https://app.kie.ai. Load credits (pay-as-you-go) before running any generation tasks. Minimum $5 credit recommended for initial testing.

prerequisites.label: Kie.ai API Key
prerequisites.satisfy: Add KIE_API_KEY=<your key> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env (chmod 600), then: openclaw config set env.vars.KIE_API_KEY "$KIE_API_KEY". Get your API key from app.kie.ai > Settings > API Keys.

prerequisites.label: Kie.ai Credits (non-zero balance)

check.note: Verify via GET https://api.kie.ai/api/v1/account/balance with Authorization: Bearer $KIE_API_KEY

prerequisites.satisfy: Top up credits at https://app.kie.ai/billing. A zero-credit account returns HTTP 402 on all generation tasks. Minimum recommended: $5 for initial setup verification (one smoke-test image ~$0.04–$0.10).
